---
# Source: test-semver/templates/semver-test.yaml
# Test: Semver function errors - comprehensive testing of semantic versioning functions
# KICS_HELM_ID_2:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kics-helm-semver-test
data:
  # ==========================================
  # Semver parsing
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semver - parses a semver string
  semverValue: "\"1.2.3\""

  # ==========================================
  # Basic semverCompare
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare - basic comparison

  # ==========================================
  # Basic Comparisons (=, !=, >, <, >=, <=)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with basic operators

  # ==========================================
  # Prerelease Versions
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with prerelease

  # ==========================================
  # Hyphen Range Comparisons
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with hyphen range (1.0.0 - 2.0.0)

  # ==========================================
  # Wildcards In Comparisons
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with wildcards (1.x, 1.2.x, *)

  # ==========================================
  # Tilde Range Comparisons (Patch)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with tilde (~1.2.3 allows patch changes)

  # ==========================================
  # Caret Range Comparisons (Major)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with caret (^1.2.3 allows minor and patch changes)

# Test: Semver function errors - comprehensive testing of semantic versioning functions
# KICS_HELM_ID_2:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kics-helm-semver-test
data:
  # ==========================================
  # Semver parsing
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semver - parses a semver string

  # ==========================================
  # Basic semverCompare
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare - basic comparison

  # ==========================================
  # Basic Comparisons (=, !=, >, <, >=, <=)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with basic operators

  # ==========================================
  # Prerelease Versions
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with prerelease
  semverComparePrerelease: "true"

  # ==========================================
  # Hyphen Range Comparisons
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with hyphen range (1.0.0 - 2.0.0)

  # ==========================================
  # Wildcards In Comparisons
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with wildcards (1.x, 1.2.x, *)

  # ==========================================
  # Tilde Range Comparisons (Patch)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with tilde (~1.2.3 allows patch changes)

  # ==========================================
  # Caret Range Comparisons (Major)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with caret (^1.2.3 allows minor and patch changes)

kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kics-helm-semver-test
data:
  # ==========================================
  # Semver parsing
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semver - parses a semver string

  # ==========================================

  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare - basic comparison

  # ==========================================
  # Basic Comparisons (=, !=, >, <, >=, <=)
  # ==========================================

  # ==========================================
  # Prerelease Versions
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with prerelease

  # ==========================================

  # ==========================================

  # Test: semverCompare with caret (^1.2.3 allows minor and patch changes)

standard.rawManifest:
---
# Source: test-semver/templates/semver-test.yaml
# Test: Semver function errors - comprehensive testing of semantic versioning functions
# KICS_HELM_ID_2:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kics-helm-semver-test
data:
  # ==========================================
  # Semver parsing
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semver - parses a semver string

  # ==========================================
  # Basic semverCompare
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare - basic comparison

  # ==========================================
  # Basic Comparisons (=, !=, >, <, >=, <=)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with basic operators

  # ==========================================
  # Prerelease Versions
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with prerelease

  # ==========================================
  # Hyphen Range Comparisons
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with hyphen range (1.0.0 - 2.0.0)

  # ==========================================
  # Wildcards In Comparisons
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with wildcards (1.x, 1.2.x, *)

  # ==========================================
  # Tilde Range Comparisons (Patch)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with tilde (~1.2.3 allows patch changes)

  # ==========================================
  # Caret Range Comparisons (Major)
  # ==========================================
  # Test: semverCompare with caret (^1.2.3 allows minor and patch changes)
  semverCompareCaret: "true"
